enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access GeoLens
pendingApprovalDescription: Your registration has been submitted. An administrator will review your request. You will be able to sign in once your account has been approved.
loginSubheadline: Sign in to save searches, build maps, and work with the catalog in one place.
browseCatalogHelper: No account needed to browse the public catalog.

loginHighlights.searchesCopy: Keep the views and filters you come back to.
loginHighlights.mapsCopy: Turn catalog data into styled, shareable maps.
loginHighlights.importsCopy: Upload new datasets and keep your workspace current.

registrationDisabledDescription: Account registration is currently not available. Contact an administrator for access.

oauthErrors.invalidGrant: Authentication was denied or expired. Please try again.
oauthErrors.accessDenied: Access was denied by the identity provider.

alreadySignedIn: You're already signed in — redirected to home.
